productDisplayName: Nike Men Mercurial Victory III HG-V Orange Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Built for speed on hard surfaces, the nike Mercurial Victory III lightweight soccer cleats are designed for that revolutionary speed, coupled with the ultimate in traction, cushioning and control. The entire shoe is designed such that it mirrors the shape of the foot and offers a premium Fit allowing you to strike the ball fast and clear. Product Details Ultra-lightweight synthetic leather adjusts to the foot shape and works to keep feet locked in place with central lace-ups for a snug fit Bold graphic on the uppers for a stylish look Contoured speed last for an ergonomic fit Full-length glass-fibre chassis for responsive energy and a firm yet flexible fit Cushioning at the heel provides a more comfortable feel and helps keep the heel from slipping Contoured sockliner at the midsole for cushioning to reduce stud pressure Glass-fibre outsole engineered for responsiveness and explosive bursts of speed while ensuring excellent traction Firm, yet flexible outsole that helps reduce stud pressure Soft-ground (SG) studs for use on wet and muddy fields that require maximum traction Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
